title: Thundrak Dûrn — "Heart of the Mountain"
bodyText:
> [!dm] Not yet visited. A gleaming dwarven city of technological marvels, enchanted opulence, automated adamantium defenses —**run on slavery**: workers force-fed mind-controlling **adamantium powder**, enchanted surveillance collars with lethal punishment, living nightmares, white-turned eyes and hair as the mark of subjugation. Puppetmasters control the narrative; outsiders see only splendor. Hidden resistance networks exist.
>
> **Jaru** ("Giant" in Dwarvish): their test-tube ultimate-soldier experiment, magic items head to toe, collar with a scry effect watched by the rulers — **faking obedience to survive** (he watched earlier iterations get executed). A ready-made tragic ally/boss.
>
> Likely the "distant powerful dwarven city" in **Root's genocide negotiation** ([[thread-roots-plan]]). S14 prep lists them among Kena's grove attackers.
